title: Pollinia formosana
intro: Pollinia formosana is a species of orchid native to Taiwan, and it is often referred to as the Formosa orchid or Formosa milk orchid. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Pollinia formosana include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are thought to contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Pollinia formosana is often prepared as a decoction or made into a tincture, and it is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
taxonomy: Pollinia formosana belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is one of the largest and most diverse plant families in the world.
